headline_seed: France records hottest-ever night as 40 drown trying to escape heatwave - Al Jazeera
draft_text:
France: 40 drowning deaths in roughly one week as people sought relief from heat topping 40 C. Meteo France placed 54 departments under red alert. AP and CBS News report victims were mainly young people, per PM Sebastien Lecornu.

And that's the mews.
